texto: You can have a failed quest, but you can't have an achieved quest and no reward.
explicacao: Citação de Sara Maitland sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You can have a failed quest, but you can't have an achieved quest and no reward.” articula reflexao, fantasy, quest em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Running alone can allow you to hit the mute button on the world... and take full advantage of exercise's stress-busting benefits. 'Running alone can be a meditative experience where you get to really think and concentrate or completely clear your mind and zone out,' a psychotherapist Michelle Maidenberg says, ... 'You have to practise letting go of the inner chatter that can get in the way of what you want to accomplish,' sports psychologist Cindra Kamphoff says, 'And that's something you have to do on your own.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sara Maitland sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Running alone can allow you to hit the mute button on the world... and take full advantage of exe…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, meditation, running, útil em momentos de running.

frase_original: Running alone can allow you to hit the mute button on the world... and take full advantage of exercise's stress-busting benefits. 'Running alone can be a meditative experience where you get to really think and concentrate or completely clear your mind and zone out,' a psychotherapist Michelle Maidenberg says, ... 'You have to practise letting go of the inner chatter that can get in the way of what you want to accomplish,' sports psychologist Cindra Kamphoff says, 'And that's something you have to do on your own.

texto: Now fairy stories are at risk too, like the forests. Padraic Column has suggested that artificial lighting dealt them a mortal wound: when people could read and be productive after dark, something fundamental changed, and there was no longer need or space for the ancient oral tradition. The stories were often confined to books, which makes the text static, and they were handed over to children.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sara Maitland: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Now fairy stories are at risk too, like the forests. Padraic Column has suggested that artificial…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, fairy-tales, forest pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: Now fairy stories are at risk too, like the forests. Padraic Column has suggested that artificial lighting dealt them a mortal wound: when people could read and be productive after dark, something fundamental changed, and there was no longer need or space for the ancient oral tradition. The stories were often confined to books, which makes the text static, and they were handed over to children.
